authors: Zijian Harrison Gong Yani Zhao Kerk Kee College of Media and Communication
raw_title: Can Visuals Facilitate or Detract Attention to Text? Examining the Effects of the Amount and Type of Visuals on Attention to Digital Longforms
title_en: Can Visuals Facilitate or Detract Attention to Text? Examining the Effects of the Amount and Type of Visuals on Attention to Digital Longforms
title_zh: 视觉元素是促进还是分散对文本的注意力？研究数字长文中视觉元素的数量和类型对注意力的影响
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究探讨了在数字长文中，视觉元素（如图片、视频）的数量和类型如何影响读者对文本的注意力。研究发现，视觉元素既可能帮助读者更好地理解内容，也可能分散他们的注意力，具体效果取决于视觉元素的使用方式。
plain_summary_en: This study investigates how the amount and type of visual elements (like images and videos) in digital long-form articles affect readers' attention to the text. The findings show that visuals can either help readers understand the content better or distract them, depending on how they are used.
research_direction_zh: 研究数字媒体中视觉与文本的交互作用，探索如何优化多媒体内容设计以提升读者体验和信息传递效果。
research_direction_en: Investigating the interaction between visuals and text in digital media, exploring how to optimize multimedia content design to enhance reader experience and information delivery.
